arts.ttl: Major Chelsea transfer takes shape as Romano confirms new stance
arts.sum: Chelsea have changed their stance on a potential loan exit of Carney Chukwuemeka, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to Fabrizio Romano, Chelsea have changed their stance on loaning out Chukwuemeka.

arts.ttl: Chelsea will be puzzled by Renato Veiga's desire to play at centre-back after what happened at Basel last season - opinion
Todd Boehly should buy £35m Chelsea fan to replace Renato Veiga, he could be another Malo Gusto - opinion
arts.sum: Would be a really exciting replacement.

arts.ttl: Chelsea attacker 'in talks' over potential Borussia Dortmund loan switch amid Stamford Bridge struggles
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly in talks with Borussia Dortmund over the loan signing of Carney Chukwuemeka, who is struggling for first-team opportunities at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea draw up transfer plan for €20m wonderkid
arts.sum: Chelsea's interest in Yeremay Hernandez has been confirmed from France, with the youngster likely to be initially loaned to RC Strasbourg . L'Equipe therefore reports that the Blues could initially send Hernandez out on loan to Strasbourg .

arts.ttl: Chelsea hold talks with Bundesliga giants over Carney Chukwuemeka loan
arts.sum: Chelsea have held talks with Borussia Dortmund over a loan move for midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: £50m player really wants to leave Stamford Bridge, Chelsea believe an exit will happen soon
